name: compute_mirr
description: Computes the Modified Internal Rate of Return (MIRR). Unlike standard IRR, MIRR uses separate rates for financing costs (negative cash flows) and reinvestment returns (positive cash flows), producing a single unambiguous return rate.

cash_flow_vector.description: Ordered cash flow series. Period 0 is typically negative (initial investment). Subsequent periods are net cash flows.

finance_rate.description: Cost of financing as decimal (e.g. 0.10 = 10%). Used to discount negative cash flows to present value.

reinvestment_rate.description: Reinvestment return rate as decimal (e.g. 0.12 = 12%). Used to compound positive cash flows to terminal value.
